comp_brs_search.name: Centre de Recherche
comp_brs_search.svg:
<svg viewBox="0 0 200 480" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg">
  <defs>
    <filter id="cardShadow" x="-20%" y="-20%" width="140%" height="140%">
      <feDropShadow dx="0" dy="4" stdDeviation="8" flood-opacity="0.08"/>

    <linearGradient id="buttonGradient" x1="0%" y1="0%" x2="0%" y2="100%">
      <stop offset="0%" style="stop-color:#2458f3;stop-opacity:1" />
      <stop offset="100%" style="stop-color:#1a4ad9;stop-opacity:1" />
    </linearGradient>
  </defs>
  
  <g id="component_root">
    <!-- Main Card Background -->
    <rect x="12" y="12" width="176" height="456" rx="8" fill="#ffffff" filter="url(#cardShadow)"/>
    
    <!-- Section Title -->
    <text x="28" y="48" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="16" fill="#111827">Centre de Recherche</text>
    
    <!-- Search Input Field -->
    <rect x="28" y="68" width="144" height="40" rx="6" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    
    <!-- Search Icon (Magnifying Glass) -->
    <g transform="translate(40, 80)">
      <circle cx="6" cy="6" r="4" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>
      <path d="M9 9 L13 13" stroke="#9ca3af" stroke-width="1.5" stroke-linecap="round"/>
    </g>
    
    <!-- Placeholder Text -->
    <text x="60" y="92" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="13" fill="#9ca3af">Rechercher par titre...</text>
    
    <!-- Facets Section Header -->
    <text x="28" y="140" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="13" fill="#111827">Facettes</text>
    
    <!-- Facet 1: Publications (Checked) -->
    <rect x="28" y="156" width="16" height="16" rx="3" fill="#2458f3"/>
    <path d="M31 164 L34 167 L40 161" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <text x="52" y="168" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#374151">Publications</text>
    
    <!-- Facet 2: Rapports (Unchecked) -->
    <rect x="28" y="184" width="16" height="16" rx="3" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="52" y="196" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#374151">Rapports</text>
    
    <!-- Facet 3: Archives (Unchecked) -->
    <rect x="28" y="212" width="16" height="16" rx="3" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="52" y="224" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#374151">Archives</text>
    
    <!-- Facet 4: Médias (Checked) -->
    <rect x="28" y="240" width="16" height="16" rx="3" fill="#2458f3"/>
    <path d="M31 248 L34 251 L40 245" stroke="white" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"/>
    <text x="52" y="252" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#374151">Médias</text>
    
    <!-- Date Range Facet -->
    <text x="28" y="290" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="13" fill="#111827">Période</text>
    
    <!-- Date Input From -->
    <rect x="28" y="304" width="64" height="32" rx="6" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="46" y="324" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#6b7280" text-anchor="middle">2020</text>
    
    <!-- Date Input To -->
    <rect x="108" y="304" width="64" height="32" rx="6" fill="#ffffff" stroke="#d5d4d0" stroke-width="1"/>
    <text x="140" y="324" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#6b7280" text-anchor="middle">2024</text>
    
    <!-- Separator -->
    <text x="92" y="324" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="12" fill="#9ca3af">-</text>
    
    <!-- Action Button -->
    <rect x="28" y="380" width="144" height="40" rx="6" fill="url(#buttonGradient)"/>
    <text x="100" y="404" font-family="Plus Jakarta Sans, sans-serif" font-weight="700" font-size="12" fill="#ffffff" text-anchor="middle">Lancer la recherche</text>
    
    <!-- Secondary Link -->
    <text x="100" y="440" font-family="Inter, sans-serif" font-size="11" fill="#6b7280" text-anchor="middle" text-decoration="underline">Réinitialiser les filtres</text>
  </g>
</svg>
